case_title: RHODES, EMORY vs. SIMES, ARTHELL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHODES, EMORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMES, ARTHELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1621 PALOU AVE, LEASE FORFEITED
